---
title: "*The Enthalpy Games* (Heat Capacity Formulas) Reference Page"
author: "DOFPro group"
format: html
html-math-method: mathjax
---
::: {.callout-important title="Still Under Construction!"}
This web page is just a bare outline. The complete details have not been filled in yet.
:::
# Intro to *The Enthalpy Games*

Main title explanation

## The Enthalpy Games: The Ballad of Integrals and Means

Video 1 explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/YGMHMAXnFY8?si=GhNpW5oYGxS4JICt" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](../../NotYetHere.qmd)

## The Enthalpy Games: Sunrise on the Calculations

Video  explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/yLJp3YQaVvo?si=jBD8ZI_cOqJ6-9ZX" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](../../NotYetHere.qmd)

# Examples and Definitions

## Examples Links

- [Nitrogen Heat Capacity Example](https://dofprobucket1.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/energy/NitrogenForVideo94.ods)

## Definitions

[Heat Capacity at Constant Volume](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Specific_heat_capacity#Specific_heat_capacity)
: The change in specific or molar internal energy with a change in temperature at constant volume for a substance *not* undergoing a phase change . $C_v \equiv (\partial \hat{U} / \partial T)|_V$

[Heat Capacity at Constant Pressure](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Specific_heat_capacity#Specific_heat_capacity)
: The change in specific or molar enthalpy with a change in temperature at constant pressure for a substance *not* undergoing a phase change. $C_p \equiv (\partial \hat{H} / \partial T)|_P$

[Shomate Equation](https://pages.uoregon.edu/palandri/gastherm/!xmisc/Shomate%201954%20Cp%20equation.pdf)
: An empirical equation for fitting experimental heat-capacity data. It is of the form $C_p = a + b T + c T^2 + d T^3 + e/T^2$

# Other Links and Videos

## Other Links

## Previous and Following Videos

### The video previous to the previous video (i.e., two videos back)

**Steam: Get the Quality Right AFTER You Table It! Part 1**<br/>*The Basics of Steam Tables*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/8tH3gXz_M8A), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/SteamTablesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/91-ThermodynamicPropertyTables1Visuals.qmd)

### The previous video (i.e., one video back)

**Steam: Get the Quality Right AFTER You Table It! Part 2**<br/>*Steam Table Examples*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/yRf09eSRM1A), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/SteamTablesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/92-ThermodynamicPropertyTables2Visuals.qmd)

### The next video (i.e., one video forward)

**Feeling the Heat? How to Get Your Best Estimate**<br/>*Estimating $C_p$, $\Delta \hat{H}_v$, $\Delta \hat{H}_m$*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/f_l3OFyuiPs), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/EstimatingHeatCapacitiesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/95-EstimatingHeatCapacitiesVisuals.qmd)

### The next after next video (i.e. two videos forward)

**Dry Bulbs, Wet Bulbs, and My Will to Live: Mastering the Psych Chart**<br/>*Psychrometric Charts*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/Nz8ADo4X2Ss), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/PsychrometricChartsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/97-PsychrometiricChartVIsuals.qmd)
